29202.title: How Well Does Bargaining Work in Consumer Markets? A Robust Bounds Approach
29202.zh_title: 讨价还价在消费者市场中效果如何？一种稳健边界方法
29202.abstract: This study provides a structural analysis of detailed, alternating-offer bargaining data from eBay, deriving bounds on buyers and sellers private value distributions using a range of assumptions on behavior. These assumptions range from very weak (assuming only that acceptance and rejection decisions are rational) to less weak (e.g., assuming that bargaining offers are weakly increasing in players' private values). We estimate the bounds and show what they imply for consumer negotiation behavior in theory and practice. For the median product, bargaining ends in impasses in 43% of negotiations even when the buyer values the good more than the seller.
29202.zh_abstract: 本研究对来自eBay的详细交替报价讨价还价数据进行了结构性分析，通过一系列行为假设推导出买方和卖方私人价值分布的边界。这些假设从非常弱（仅假设接受和拒绝决策是理性的）到不那么弱（例如，假设讨价还价报价随参与者私人价值弱递增）。我们估计了这些边界，并展示了它们在理论和实践中对消费者谈判行为的含义。对于中位数产品，即使在买方对商品的估值高于卖方的情况下，讨价还价在43%的谈判中以僵局告终。
29202.meta: Programs：IO, TWP；JEL：C57, C78, D47, D82, L81

29201.title: The Financial Channel of Wage Rigidity
29201.abstract: I propose a financial channel of wage rigidity. In recessions, rather than propping up marginal (new hires’) costs of labor, rigid average wages squeeze cash flows, forcing firms to cut hiring due to financial constraints. Indeed, empirical cash flows and profits would turn acyclical if wages were only moderately more procyclical. I study this channel in a search and matching model with financial constraints and rigid wages among incumbent workers, while new hires’ wages are flexible. Individually, each feature generates no amplification. By contrast, their interaction can account for much of the empirical labor market fluctuations—breaking the neutrality of incumbents’ wages for hiring, and showing that financial amplification of business cycles requires wage rigidity.
29201.zh_abstract: 我提出了工资刚性的金融渠道。在经济衰退中，刚性的平均工资不是支撑边际（新雇佣）劳动力成本，而是挤压现金流，迫使企业因金融约束而削减招聘。事实上，如果工资只是适度地更顺周期，经验性的现金流和利润将变得非周期性。我在一个具有金融约束和在职员工工资刚性的搜索与匹配模型中研究这一渠道，而新员工的工资是灵活的。单独来看，每个特征都不会产生放大效应。相比之下，它们的相互作用可以解释大部分经验性的劳动力市场波动——打破了在职员工工资对招聘的中性影响，并表明商业周期的金融放大需要工资刚性。
29201.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, LS, ME, PE, PR；JEL：E2, G3, J01

29200.title: The Long-Run Impacts of Mexican-American School Desegregation
29200.zh_title: 墨西哥裔美国人学校废除种族隔离的长期影响
29200.abstract: We present the first quantitative analysis of the impact of ending de jure segregation of Mexican-American school children in the United States by examining the effects of the 1947 Mendez v. Westminster court decision on long-run educational attainment for Hispanics and non-Hispanic whites in California. Our identification strategy relies on comparing individuals across California counties that vary in their likelihood of segregating and across birth cohorts that vary in their exposure to the Mendez court ruling based on school start age. Results point to a significant increase in educational attainment for Hispanics who were fully exposed to school desegregation.
29200.zh_abstract: 我们首次定量分析了美国结束对墨西哥裔学童法律上种族隔离的影响，通过考察1947年门德斯诉威斯敏斯特案对加利福尼亚州西班牙裔和非西班牙裔白人长期教育成就的影响。我们的识别策略依赖于比较加利福尼亚州各县（这些县在隔离可能性上存在差异）以及不同出生队列（这些队列根据入学年龄对门德斯案裁决的暴露程度不同）。结果表明，完全暴露于学校废除种族隔离的西班牙裔教育成就显著提高。
29200.meta: Programs：DAE, ED, LS；JEL：I24, I26, J15, J18

29218.title: The Impact of Healthcare IT on Clinical Quality, Productivity and Workers
29218.zh_title: 医疗信息技术对临床质量、生产率和劳动力的影响
29218.authors: Ari Bronsoler, Joseph J. Doyle Jr., John Van Reenen
29218.abstract: Adoption of health information and communication technologies (“HICT”) has surged over the past two decades. We survey the medical and economic literature on HICT adoption and its impact on clinical outcomes, productivity and labor. We find that HICT improves clinical outcomes and lowers healthcare costs, but (i) the effects are modest so far, (ii) it takes time for these effects to materialize, and (iii) there is much variation in the impact. More evidence on the causal effects of HICT on productivity is needed to guide further adoption. There is little econometric work directly investigating the impact of HICT on labor, but what there is suggests no substantial negative effects on employment and earnings. Overall, while healthcare is “exceptional” in many ways, we are struck by the similarities to the wider findings on ICT and productivity stressing the importance of complementary factors (e.g. management and skills) in determining HICT impacts.
29218.zh_abstract: 过去二十年，健康信息与通信技术（HICT）的采用激增。我们调查了关于HICT采用及其对临床结果、生产率和劳动力影响的医学和经济学文献。我们发现，HICT改善了临床结果并降低了医疗成本，但（i）目前效果温和，（ii）这些效果需要时间才能显现，（iii）影响存在很大差异。需要更多关于HICT对生产率因果效应的证据来指导进一步采用。直接调查HICT对劳动力影响的经济计量研究很少，但现有研究表明对就业和收入没有显著的负面影响。总体而言，尽管医疗保健在许多方面“特殊”，但我们对其与ICT和生产率更广泛研究结果的相似性感到惊讶，这些研究强调了互补因素（如管理和技能）在决定HICT影响中的重要性。
29218.meta: Programs：EH, LS, PR；JEL：I12, I18, J21, J24, O14

29217.title: A Theory of the Global Financial Cycle
29217.authors: J. Scott Davis, Eric van Wincoop
29217.abstract: We develop a theory to account for changes in prices of risky and safe assets and gross and net capital flows over the global financial cycle (GFC). The multi-country model features global risk-aversion shocks and heterogeneity of investors both within and across countries. Within-country heterogeneity is needed to account for the drop in gross capital flows during a negative GFC shock (higher global risk-aversion). Cross-country heterogeneity is needed to account for the differential vulnerability of countries to a negative GFC shock. The key vulnerability is associated with leverage. In both the data and the theory, leveraged countries (net borrowers of safe assets) deleverage through negative net outflows of risky assets and positive net outflows of safe assets, experience a rise in the current account and a greater than average drop in risky asset prices. The opposite is the case for non-leveraged countries (net lenders of safe assets).
29217.zh_abstract: 我们发展了一个理论来解释全球金融周期（GFC）中风险资产和安全资产价格以及总资本流动和净资本流动的变化。该多国模型具有全球风险厌恶冲击以及国家内部和国家之间投资者的异质性。国家内部的异质性对于解释负面GFC冲击（更高的全球风险厌恶）期间总资本流动的下降是必要的。国家间的异质性对于解释各国对负面GFC冲击的不同脆弱性是必要的。关键脆弱性与杠杆相关。在数据和理论中，杠杆国家（安全资产的净借款人）通过风险资产的净流出和安全资产的净流入去杠杆化，经历经常账户上升和风险资产价格高于平均水平的下降。非杠杆国家（安全资产的净贷款人）则相反。

29216.title: Intended and Unintended Effects of E-cigarette Taxes on Youth Tobacco Use
29216.zh_title: 电子烟税对青少年烟草使用的预期与非预期效应
29216.authors: Rahi Abouk, Charles J. Courtemanche, Dhaval M. Dave, Bo Feng, Abigail S. Friedman, Johanna Catherine Maclean, Michael F. Pesko, Joseph J. Sabia, Samuel Safford
29216.abstract: Over the past decade, rising youth use of e-cigarettes and other electronic nicotine delivery systems (ENDS) has contributed to aggressive regulation by state and local governments. Between 2010 and mid-2019, ten states and two large counties adopted ENDS taxes. We use two large national surveys (Monitoring the Future and the Youth Risk Behavior Surveillance System) to estimate the impact of ENDS taxes on youth tobacco use. We find that ENDS taxes reduce youth ENDS consumption, with estimated ENDS tax elasticities of -0.06 to -0.21. However, we estimate sizable positive cigarette cross-tax effects, suggesting economic substitution between cigarettes and ENDS for youth. These substitution effects are particularly large for frequent cigarette smoking. We conclude that the unintended effects of ENDS taxation may considerably undercut or even outweigh any public health gains.
29216.zh_abstract: 在过去十年中，青少年使用电子烟和其他电子尼古丁输送系统（ENDS）的增加促使州和地方政府采取严格监管。2010年至2019年中，十个州和两个大县通过了ENDS税。我们使用两项大型全国调查（“监测未来”和“青少年风险行为监测系统”）来估计ENDS税对青少年烟草使用的影响。我们发现，ENDS税减少了青少年ENDS消费，估计的ENDS税收弹性为-0.06至-0.21。然而，我们估计出显著的正向香烟交叉税效应，表明青少年在香烟和ENDS之间存在经济替代。这些替代效应对于频繁吸烟尤为显著。我们得出结论，ENDS税收的非预期效应可能大大削弱甚至超过任何公共健康收益。
29216.meta: Programs：CH, EH, LE, PE；JEL：H2, I1, I18

29215.title: Matching in the Dark? Inequalities in student to degree match
29215.zh_title: 暗中的匹配？学生与学位质量之间的不平等
29215.authors: Stuart Campbell, Lindsey Macmillan, Richard Murphy, Gillian Wyness
29215.abstract: This paper examines inequalities in the match between student and degree quality using linked administrative data from schools, universities and tax authorities. We analyse two measures of match at the university-subject level: undergraduate enrollment qualifications, and graduate earnings. We find for both that disadvantaged students match to lower quality degrees across the entire distribution of achievement, in a setting with uniform fees and a generous financial aid system. While there are negligible gender gaps in academic match, high-attaining women systematically undermatch in terms of expected earnings, driven by subject choice. These inequalities in match are largest among the most undermatched.
29215.zh_abstract: 本文利用来自学校、大学和税务部门的关联行政数据，研究了学生与学位质量之间匹配的不平等问题。我们分析了大学-学科层面的两种匹配度量：本科入学资格和毕业生收入。我们发现，在统一学费和慷慨的助学金体系下，弱势学生在整个成绩分布中都匹配到较低质量的学位。虽然在学术匹配方面性别差距可以忽略不计，但高成就女性在预期收入方面系统性低配，这由学科选择驱动。这些匹配不平等在低配最严重的群体中最为显著。

29214.title: Opportunity Unraveled: Private Information and the Missing Markets for Financing Human Capital
29214.zh_title: 机会瓦解：私人信息与人力资本融资的缺失市场
29214.abstract: Investing in college carries high returns but comes with considerable risk. Financial products like equity contracts can mitigate this risk, yet college is typically financed through non-dischargeable, government-backed student loans. This paper argues that adverse selection has unraveled private markets for college-financing contracts that mitigate risk. We use survey data on students’ expected post-college outcomes to estimate their knowledge about future outcomes and quantify the threat of adverse selection in markets for equity contracts and several state-contingent debt contracts. We find students hold significant private knowledge of their future earnings, academic persistence, employment, and loan repayment likelihood, beyond what is captured by observable characteristics. Our empirical results imply that a typical college-goer must expect to pay back $\$1.64$ in present value for every $\$1$ of equity financing to cover the financier’s costs of covering those who would adversely select their contract. We estimate that college-goers are not willing to accept these terms so that private markets unravel. Nonetheless, our framework quantifies significant welfare gains from government subsidies that would open up these missing markets and partially insure college-going risks.
29214.zh_abstract: 大学投资回报率高，但伴随相当大的风险。股权合约等金融产品可以缓解这种风险，然而大学通常通过不可免除的政府支持学生贷款来融资。本文认为，逆向选择已经瓦解了缓解风险的大学融资合约的私人市场。我们利用学生对大学毕业后结果的预期调查数据，来估计他们对未来结果的了解程度，并量化股权合约和几种状态依存债务合约市场中逆向选择的威胁。我们发现，学生对其未来收入、学业持续性、就业和贷款偿还可能性拥有显著的私人知识，超出了可观测特征所能捕捉的信息。我们的实证结果表明，一个典型的大学就读生必须预期每获得1美元股权融资，就要偿还现值1.64美元，才能覆盖金融家因那些逆向选择合约者而产生的成本。我们估计大学就读生不愿接受这些条款，因此私人市场瓦解。尽管如此，我们的框架量化了政府补贴带来的显著福利收益，这些补贴可以开放这些缺失市场，并部分保险大学就读风险。
29214.meta: Programs：AP, CF, CH, ED, EFG, IO, LS, PE, PR；JEL：H0, I22

29213.title: The Employment and Redistributive Effects of Reducing or Eliminating Minimum Wage Tip Credits
29213.zh_title: 减少或取消最低工资小费抵免的就业与再分配效应
29213.abstract: Recent policy debate on minimum wages has focused not only on raising the minimum wage, but on eliminating the tip credit for restaurant workers. We use data on past variation in tip credits—or minimum wages for restaurant workers—to provide evidence on the potential impacts of eliminating (or reducing) the tip credit. Our evidence points to higher tipped minimum wages (smaller tip credits) reducing jobs among tipped restaurant workers, without earnings effects on those who remain employed sufficiently large to raise total earnings in this sector. And most of our evidence provides no indication that higher tipped minimum wages would be well targeted to poor or low-income families or reduce the likelihood of being poor or very low income.
29213.zh_abstract: 近期关于最低工资的政策辩论不仅关注提高最低工资，还关注取消餐厅工人的小费抵免。我们利用过去小费抵免（即餐厅工人最低工资）变动的数据，为取消（或减少）小费抵免的潜在影响提供证据。我们的证据表明，更高的有最低工资（更小的小费抵免）减少了有餐厅工人的就业，而继续就业者的收入效应不足以大到提高该部门的总收入。而且，我们的大部分证据并未表明更高的有最低工资能精准针对贫困或低收入家庭，或降低陷入贫困或极低收入的可能性。

29212.title: Corporate Actions and the Manipulation of Retail Investors in China: An Analysis of Stock Splits
29212.zh_title: 公司行为与中国散户投资者的操纵：股票拆分分析
29212.authors: Sheridan Titman, Chishen Wei. Wei, Bin Zhao
29212.abstract: We identify a group of “suspicious” firms that use stock splits—perhaps, along with other activities—to artificially inflate their share prices. Following the initiation of suspicious splits, share prices temporarily increase, and subsequently decline below their pre-split levels. Using account level data from the Shanghai Stock Exchange, we find that small retail investors acquire shares in firms initiating suspicious splits, while more sophisticated investors accumulate positions before suspicious split announcements and sell in the post-split period. We also find that insiders sell large blocks of shares and obtain loans using company stock as collateral around the initiation of suspicious splits.
29212.zh_abstract: 我们识别出一组“可疑”公司，它们利用股票拆分——可能还伴随其他活动——来人为抬高股价。在可疑拆分启动后，股价暂时上涨，随后下跌至拆分前水平以下。利用上海证券交易所的账户级数据，我们发现小型散户投资者购买启动可疑拆分的公司的股票，而更精明的投资者在可疑拆分公告前积累头寸，并在拆分后期间卖出。我们还发现，内部人士在可疑拆分启动前后出售大额股票，并以公司股票为抵押获得贷款。

29211.title: Venture Capital and Startup Agglomeration
29211.zh_title: 风险投资与初创企业集聚
29211.abstract: The paper studies venture capital’s (VC) role in the geographic clustering of high-growth startups. We exploit a rule change that disproportionately impacted U.S. regions that historically lacked VC financing via a restriction of banks to invest in the asset class. A one-standard-deviation increase in VCs’ exposure to the rule led to a 20% decline in fund size and a 10% decrease in the likelihood of raising a follow-on fund. Startups were not wholly cushioned: financing and valuations declined. Startups also moved out of impacted states after the rule change, likely exacerbating existing geographic disparity in entrepreneurship.
29211.zh_abstract: 本文研究风险投资在高增长初创企业地理集聚中的作用。我们利用一项规则变更，该变更通过限制银行投资于该资产类别，对历史上缺乏风险投资融资的美国地区产生了不成比例的影响。风险投资对该规则暴露程度的一个标准差增加，导致基金规模下降20%，以及筹集后续基金的可能性下降10%。初创企业并未完全得到缓冲：融资和估值下降。规则变更后，初创企业也迁出受影响的州，这可能加剧了创业方面已有的地理差异。
29211.meta: Programs：CF, PR；JEL：G21, G23, G24, K22, L26

29210.title: Market Freezes
29210.authors: Chao Gu, Guido Menzio, Randall Wright, Yu Zhu
29210.abstract: During the financial crisis apparently centralized markets continued to function while trade in OTC markets froze. We use search-and-bargaining theory to ascertain conditions that allow trade to temporarily freeze in decentralized markets, focusing on the roles of liquidity and self-fulfilling prophecies. We show standard models can have recurrent, belief-driven hot and cold spells, but not freezes and thaws. A simple specification that has freezes assumes negative returns. A more realistic one incorporates information frictions (costly asset-quality verification). Another uses different frictions to get credit freezes. We also discuss policy implications, and go into detail on the nature of OTC markets.
29210.zh_abstract: 在金融危机期间，集中市场显然继续运转，而场外市场的交易却冻结了。我们利用搜索与讨价还价理论来确定允许交易在分散市场中暂时冻结的条件，重点关注流动性和自我实现预言的作用。我们表明，标准模型可以出现反复的、信念驱动的热期和冷期，但不能出现冻结和解冻。一个具有冻结的简单设定假设负回报。一个更现实的设定包含信息摩擦（昂贵的资产质量验证）。另一个设定利用不同的摩擦来获得信贷冻结。我们还讨论了政策含义，并详细阐述了场外市场的性质。
29210.meta: Programs：EFG, ME；JEL：D53, D83, E30, E44, E52, G14

29209.title: What Can Stockouts Tell Us About Inflation? Evidence from Online Micro Data
29209.zh_title: 缺货能告诉我们关于通胀的什么？来自在线微观数据的证据
29209.abstract: We use a detailed micro dataset on product availability to construct a direct high-frequency measure of consumer product shortages during the 2020–2021 pandemic. We document a widespread multi-fold rise in shortages in nearly all sectors early in the pandemic. Over time, the composition of shortages evolved from many temporary stockouts to mostly discontinued products, concentrated in fewer sectors. We show that unexpected product shortages have signiﬁcant inﬂationary eﬀects within three months. We develop a model of inventories in a sector facing both demand and cost disturbances, and use the observed joint dynamics of stockouts and prices to show that these eﬀects can be associated with elevated cost of replenishing inventories.
29209.zh_abstract: 我们利用关于产品可用性的详细微观数据集，构建了2020-2021年疫情期间消费者产品短缺的直接高频度量。我们记录了疫情初期几乎所有部门普遍出现的数倍短缺增长。随着时间的推移，短缺的构成从许多临时缺货演变为主要是停产产品，集中在较少的部门。我们表明，意外的产品短缺在三个月内会产生显著的通货膨胀效应。我们开发了一个面临需求和成本扰动的部门库存模型，并利用观察到的缺货和价格的联合动态来表明，这些效应可能与库存补货成本上升有关。

29208.title: Who Cares More? Allocation with Diverse Preference Intensities
29208.zh_title: 谁更在意？具有不同偏好强度的分配
29208.authors: Pietro Ortoleva, Evgenii Safonov, Leeat Yariv
29208.abstract: Goods and services---public housing, medical appointments, schools---are often allocated to individuals who rank them similarly but differ in their preference intensities. We characterize optimal allocation rules when individual preferences are known and when they are not. Several insights emerge. First-best allocations may involve assigning some agents "lotteries" between high- and low-ranked goods. When preference intensities are private information, second-best allocations always involve such lotteries and, crucially, may coincide with first-best allocations. Furthermore, second-best allocations may entail disposal of services. We discuss a market-based alternative and show how it differs.
29208.zh_abstract: 商品和服务——公共住房、医疗预约、学校——通常分配给那些排名相似但偏好强度不同的个体。我们刻画了当个体偏好已知和未知时的最优分配规则。出现了几个见解。第一最优分配可能涉及将一些代理人分配到高排名和低排名商品之间的“彩票”。当偏好强度是私人信息时，第二最优分配总是涉及此类彩票，并且关键的是，可能与第一最优分配一致。此外，第二最优分配可能涉及服务的处置。我们讨论了一种基于市场的替代方案，并展示了其不同之处。

29207.title: Hedging and Competition
29207.authors: Erasmo Giambona, Anil Kumar, Gordon M. Phillips
29207.abstract: We study how risk management through hedging impacts firms and competition among firms in the life insurance industry - an industry with over 7 Trillion in assets and over 1,000 private and public firms. We show that firms that are likely to face costly external finance increase hedging after staggered state-level financial reform that reduces the costs of hedging. Post reform impacted firms have lower risk and fewer negative income shocks. Product market competition is also impacted. Firms that previously are more likely to face costly external finance, lower price, increase policy sales and increase their market share post reform. The results are consistent with hedging allowing firms that face potential costly financial distress to decrease risk and become more competitive.
29207.zh_abstract: 我们研究了对冲风险管理如何影响人寿保险行业中的企业及其竞争——该行业资产超过7万亿美元，拥有超过1000家私营和上市公司。我们发现，在分阶段实施的州级金融改革降低了对冲成本后，那些可能面临昂贵外部融资的企业增加了对冲操作。改革后，受影响的企业风险降低，负面收入冲击减少。产品市场竞争也受到影响。此前更可能面临昂贵外部融资的企业，在改革后降低了价格，增加了保单销售，并扩大了市场份额。这些结果与以下观点一致：对冲使可能面临昂贵财务困境的企业能够降低风险并变得更具竞争力。
29207.meta: Programs：CF, IO；JEL：D0, D22, D43, G22, G28, G31, G32, G33

29206.title: Markups and Fixed Costs in Generic and Off-Patent Pharmaceutical Markets
29206.zh_title: 仿制药和专利过期药品市场的加价与固定成本
29206.abstract: There is wide dispersion in pharmaceutical prices across countries with comparable quality standards. Under monopoly, off-patent and generic drug prices are at least four times higher in the United States than in comparable English-speaking high income countries. With five or more competitors, off-patent drug prices are similar or lower. Our analysis shows that differential US markups are largely driven by the market power of drug suppliers and not due to wholesale intermediaries or pharmacies. Furthermore, we show that the traditional mechanism of reducing market power – free entry – is limited because implied entry costs are substantially higher in the US.
29206.zh_abstract: 在质量标准相当的国家之间，药品价格存在巨大差异。在垄断情况下，专利过期药品和仿制药在美国的价格至少是其他类似英语高收入国家的四倍。当有五个或更多竞争者时，专利过期药品的价格相似或更低。我们的分析表明，美国加价差异主要由药品供应商的市场力量驱动，而非批发中介或药房。此外，我们证明，降低市场力量的传统机制——自由进入——是有限的，因为美国的隐含进入成本要高得多。
29206.meta: Programs：EH, IO, ITI；JEL：F14, I11, L44, L65

29205.title: Models Behaving Badly: The Limits of Data-Driven Lending
29205.zh_title: 行为失常的模型：数据驱动贷款的局限性
29205.authors: Itzhak Ben-David, Mark J. Johnson, René M. Stulz
29205.abstract: Data-driven lending relies on the calibration of models using training periods. We find that this type of lending is not resilient in the presence of economic conditions that are materially different from those experienced during the training period. Using data from a small business fintech lending platform, we document that the small business credit supply collapsed during the COVID-19 crisis of March 2020 even though the demand for loans doubled relative to pre-pandemic levels. As the month progressed, most lenders significantly reduced or halted their lending activities, likely due to the heightened risk of model miscalibration under the new economic conditions.
29205.zh_abstract: 数据驱动贷款依赖于使用训练期对模型进行校准。我们发现，当经济条件与训练期经历的条件存在显著差异时，这种贷款方式缺乏韧性。利用一家小型企业金融科技贷款平台的数据，我们记录到，在2020年3月COVID-19危机期间，小型企业信贷供应崩溃，尽管贷款需求相比疫情前翻了一番。随着该月的推进，大多数贷款机构大幅减少或停止了贷款活动，这很可能是由于新经济条件下模型校准错误的风险增加。

29204.title: Are Collateral-Constraint Models Ready for Macroprudential Policy Design?
29204.zh_title: 抵押品约束模型是否已准备好用于宏观审慎政策设计？
29204.authors: Pablo Ottonello, Diego J. Perez, Paolo Varraso
29204.abstract: We study the design of macroprudential policies based on quantitative collateral-constraint models. We show that the desirability of macroprudential policies critically depends on the specific form of collateral used in debt contracts: While inefficiencies arise when current prices affect collateral---a frequent benchmark used to guide policies---they do not when only future prices affect collateral. Since the microfoundations and quantitative predictions of models with future-price collateral constraints do not appear less plausible than those using current prices, we conclude that additional empirical work is essential for the use of these models in macroprudential policy design.
29204.zh_abstract: 我们研究了基于定量抵押品约束模型的宏观审慎政策设计。我们表明，宏观审慎政策的可取性关键取决于债务合同中使用的抵押品具体形式：当当前价格影响抵押品时——这是指导政策的常用基准——会出现效率低下；而当只有未来价格影响抵押品时，则不会出现效率低下。由于采用未来价格抵押品约束的模型的微观基础与定量预测似乎并不比使用当前价格的模型更不可信，我们得出结论，需要额外的实证工作才能将这些模型用于宏观审慎政策设计。
29204.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：E32, E44, F32, F36, F38, G01

29203.title: Inequality in Mortality between Black and White Americans by Age, Place, and Cause, and in Comparison to Europe, 1990-2018
29203.zh_title: 1990-2018年美国黑人与白人按年龄、地点和死因划分的死亡率不平等及与欧洲的比较
29203.authors: Hannes Schwandt, Janet Currie, Marlies Bär, James Banks, Paola Bertoli, Aline Bütikofer, Sarah Cattan, Beatrice Zong-Ying Chao, Claudia Costa, Libertad Gonzalez, Veronica Grembi, Kristiina Huttunen, René Karadakic, Lucy Kraftman, Sonya Krutikova, Stefano Lombardi, Peter Redler, Carlos Riumallo-Herl, Ana Rodríguez-González, Kjell Salvanes, Paula Santana, Josselin Thuilliez, Eddy van Doorslaer, Tom Van Ourti, Joachim Winter, Bram Wouterse, Amelie Wuppermann
29203.abstract:
Although there is a large gap between Black and White American life expectancies, the gap fell 48.9% between 1990-2018, mainly due to mortality declines among Black Americans. We examine age-specific mortality trends and racial gaps in life expectancy in rich and poor U.S. areas and with reference to six European countries. 
Inequalities in life expectancy are starker in the U.S. than in Europe. In 1990 White Americans and Europeans in rich areas had similar overall life expectancy, while life expectancy for White Americans in poor areas was lower. But since then even rich White Americans have lost ground relative to Europeans. Meanwhile, the gap in life expectancy between Black Americans and Europeans decreased by 8.3%. 
Black life expectancy increased more than White life expectancy in all U.S. areas, but improvements in poorer areas had the greatest impact on the racial life expectancy gap. The causes that contributed the most to Black mortality reductions included: Cancer, homicide, HIV, and causes originating in the fetal or infant period. 
Life expectancy for both Black and White Americans plateaued or slightly declined after 2012, but this stalling was most evident among Black Americans even prior to the COVID-19 pandemic. If improvements had continued at the 1990-2012 rate, the racial gap in life expectancy would have closed by 2036. European life expectancy also stalled after 2014. Still, the comparison with Europe suggests that mortality rates of both Black and White Americans could fall much further across all ages and in both rich and poor areas.
29203.zh_abstract: 尽管美国黑人与白人预期寿命之间存在巨大差距，但1990年至2018年间，这一差距缩小了48.9%，主要归因于美国黑人死亡率的下降。我们研究了美国富裕和贫困地区的年龄别死亡率趋势及种族预期寿命差距，并与六个欧洲国家进行了比较。预期寿命不平等在美国比在欧洲更为显著。1990年，富裕地区的美国白人和欧洲人总体预期寿命相似，而贫困地区的美国白人预期寿命较低。但自那以后，即使是富裕的美国白人也相对于欧洲人失去了优势。与此同时，美国黑人与欧洲人之间的预期寿命差距缩小了8.3%。在所有美国地区，黑人预期寿命的增长幅度均超过白人，但贫困地区的改善对种族预期寿命差距的影响最大。对黑人死亡率下降贡献最大的死因包括：癌症、凶杀、艾滋病毒以及胎儿或婴儿期起源的原因。2012年后，美国黑人和白人的预期寿命均趋于平稳或略有下降，但这种停滞在黑人中最为明显，甚至在COVID-19大流行之前就已出现。如果改善速度保持在1990-2012年的水平，种族预期寿命差距本应在2036年消失。欧洲的预期寿命在2014年后也出现停滞。尽管如此，与欧洲的比较表明，美国黑人和白人的死亡率在所有年龄段以及富裕和贫困地区都可能进一步大幅下降。

29247.title: Harms of AI
29247.abstract: This essay discusses several potential economic, political and social costs of the current path of AI technologies. I argue that if AI continues to be deployed along its current trajectory and remains unregulated, it may produce various social, economic and political harms. These include: damaging competition, consumer privacy and consumer choice; excessively automating work, fueling inequality, inefficiently pushing down wages, and failing to improve worker productivity; and damaging political discourse, democracy's most fundamental lifeblood. Although there is no conclusive evidence suggesting that these costs are imminent or substantial, it may be useful to understand them before they are fully realized and become harder or even impossible to reverse, precisely because of AI's promising and wide-reaching potential. I also suggest that these costs are not inherent to the nature of AI technologies, but are related to how they are being used and developed at the moment - to empower corporations and governments against workers and citizens. As a result, efforts to limit and reverse these costs may need to rely on regulation and policies to redirect AI research. Attempts to contain them just by promoting competition may be insufficient.
29247.zh_abstract: 本文讨论了当前人工智能技术发展路径可能带来的若干经济、政治和社会成本。我认为，如果人工智能继续沿着当前轨迹部署且不受监管，它可能会产生各种社会、经济和政治危害。这些危害包括：损害竞争、消费者隐私和消费者选择；过度自动化工作，加剧不平等，低效压低工资，且未能提高工人生产率；以及损害政治话语——民主最根本的生命线。尽管没有确凿证据表明这些成本迫在眉睫或规模巨大，但在它们完全显现并变得难以甚至不可能逆转之前理解它们可能是有益的，这恰恰是因为人工智能具有广阔且深远的潜力。我还指出，这些成本并非人工智能技术本身所固有，而是与它们目前的使用和开发方式有关——即用于增强企业和政府相对于工人和公民的权力。因此，限制和逆转这些成本的努力可能需要依赖监管和政策来重新引导人工智能研究。仅通过促进竞争来遏制这些成本的尝试可能是不够的。
29247.meta: Programs：EFG, IO, LS, PR；JEL：J23, J31, L13, L40, O33, P16

29246.title: The Dynamics of Referral Hiring and Racial Inequality: Evidence from Brazil
29246.zh_title: 推荐招聘的动态机制与种族不平等：来自巴西的证据
29246.abstract: We study how referral hiring contributes to racial inequality in firm-level labor demand over the firm's life cycle using data from Brazil. We consider a search model where referral networks are segregated, firms are more informed about the match quality of referred candidates, and some referrals are made by non-referred employees. Consistent with the model, we find that firms are more likely to hire candidates and less likely to dismiss employees of the same race as the founder, but these differences diminish as firms' cumulative hires increase. Referral hiring helps to explain racial differences in dismissals, seniority, and employer size.
29246.zh_abstract: 我们利用巴西的数据，研究了推荐招聘如何在企业生命周期内对企业层面劳动力需求中的种族不平等做出贡献。我们考虑了一个搜索模型，其中推荐网络是隔离的，企业对推荐候选人的匹配质量了解更多，并且一些推荐是由非推荐员工做出的。与模型一致，我们发现企业更有可能雇佣与创始人同种族的候选人，并且更不可能解雇与创始人同种族的员工，但这些差异随着企业累计雇佣人数的增加而减小。推荐招聘有助于解释解雇、资历和雇主规模方面的种族差异。

29245.title: Perceptions of Racial Gaps, their Causes, and Ways to Reduce Them
29245.zh_title: 对种族差距、其原因及缩小途径的认知
29245.authors: Alberto Alesina, Matteo F. Ferroni, Stefanie Stantcheva
29245.abstract: This paper studies how beliefs about racial inequalities and their causes vary and shape support for race-targeted and redistribution policies among Black and white Americans, including both adults and teenagers. We collect original large-scale survey data to provide new evidence on perceptions, attitudes, and policy views on racial issues and study the causal impact of information on policy views. We highlight significant heterogeneity along racial and partisan lines in perceived racial gaps in income and mobility. Yet, the biggest discrepancies are in how people explain the existence of these gaps, i.e., their perceived causes. White Democratic and Black respondents are much more likely to attribute racial inequities to systemic factors, such as ad- verse past and present circumstances, and want to act on them with race-targeted and general redistribution policies. White Republicans are more likely to attribute racial gaps to individual-based factors, such as individual effort or actions. These views are already deeply entrenched in teenagers, based on their race and their parents' political affiliation. A policy decomposition shows that the perceived causes of racial inequities are the strongest predictors of support for race-targeted or redistribution policies, a finding confirmed by the experimental results.
29245.zh_abstract: 本文研究了关于种族不平等及其原因的信念如何在黑人和白人美国人（包括成年人和青少年）中变化，并如何影响他们对种族定向政策和再分配政策的支持。我们收集了原始的大规模调查数据，以提供关于种族问题认知、态度和政策观点的新证据，并研究信息对政策观点的因果影响。我们强调了在种族和党派界限上，人们对收入和社会流动性方面感知到的种族差距存在显著的异质性。然而，最大的分歧在于人们如何解释这些差距的存在，即他们感知到的原因。白人民主党人和黑人受访者更倾向于将种族不平等归因于系统性因素，例如不利的过去和当前环境，并希望通过种族定向政策和一般性再分配政策来采取行动。白人共和党人更倾向于将种族差距归因于基于个人的因素，例如个人努力或行为。这些观点在青少年中已经根深蒂固，这取决于他们的种族和父母的政治派别。一项政策分解表明，感知到的种族不平等原因是支持种族定向或再分配政策的最强预测因素，这一发现得到了实验结果的证实。
29245.meta: Programs：PE, POL；JEL：D31, D72, H23, H24, H41, J15, P16

29244.title: New Evidence on Redlining by Federal Housing Programs in the 1930s
29244.zh_title: 20世纪30年代联邦住房计划红线划定的新证据
29244.authors: Price V. Fishback, Jonathan Rose, Kenneth A. Snowden, Thomas Storrs
29244.abstract: We show that the Federal Housing Administration (FHA), from its inception in the 1930s, did not insure mortgages in low income urban neighborhoods where the vast majority of urban Black Americans lived. The agency evaluated neighborhoods using block-level information collected by New Deal relief programs and the Census in many cities. The FHA’s exclusionary pattern predates the advent of the infamous maps later made by the Home Owners’ Loan Corporation (HOLC) and shows little change after the drafting of those maps. In contrast, the HOLC itself broadly loaned to such neighborhoods and to Black homeowners. We conclude that the HOLC’s redlining maps had little effect on the geographic distribution of either program’s mortgage market activity, and that the FHA crafted and implemented its own redlining methodology prior to the HOLC.
29244.zh_abstract: 我们表明，联邦住房管理局（FHA）自20世纪30年代成立以来，并未在低收入城市社区（绝大多数美国城市黑人居住的地方）提供抵押贷款保险。该机构利用新政救济计划和人口普查在许多城市收集的街区层面信息来评估社区。FHA的排斥模式早于后来由房主贷款公司（HOLC）绘制的臭名昭著的地图，并且在那些地图绘制后几乎没有变化。相比之下，HOLC本身广泛向此类社区和黑人房主提供贷款。我们得出结论，HOLC的红线地图对任何一个计划的抵押贷款市场活动的地理分布影响甚微，并且FHA在HOLC之前就制定并实施了其自己的红线划定方法。
29244.meta: Programs：DAE；JEL：G21, G22, G28, G5, N22, N42, N92, R31

29243.title: Police Officer Assignment and Neighborhood Crime
29243.authors: Bocar Ba, Patrick Bayer, Nayoung Rim, Roman Rivera, Modibo Sidibé
29243.abstract: We develop an empirical model of the mechanism used to assign police officers to Chicago districts and examine the efficiency and equity of alternative allocations. Chicago, like most major US cities, uses a bidding process that grants priority based on seniority, resulting in the assignment of the least experienced officers to the most violent and lowest-income neighborhoods. Our empirical model combines estimates of heterogeneous officer preferences underlying the bidding process with causal estimates of officer experience on neighborhood crime and policing. We find that more experienced officers are more effective at deterring violent crime while also being much less likely to use force in comparable policing contexts. We estimate that equalizing officer seniority across districts would reduce Chicago’s overall violent crime rate by 4.6 percent and officer use of force by 10 percent. Inequality in crime, and officer use of force across neighborhoods would also decrease sharply. Given officer preferences, we show that this assignment can be achieved in a revenue-neutral way while resulting in small welfare gains for police officers, implying that it is both more equitable and more efficient.
29243.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一个经验模型，用于描述将警察分配到芝加哥各区的机制，并检验替代性分配的效率和公平性。与大多数美国主要城市一样，芝加哥采用一种基于资历优先的竞标流程，导致最缺乏经验的警察被分配到最暴力、收入最低的社区。我们的经验模型结合了对竞标过程背后异质性警察偏好的估计，以及警察经验对社区犯罪和警务的因果效应估计。我们发现，经验更丰富的警察在阻止暴力犯罪方面更有效，同时在类似的警务情境中使用武力的可能性要低得多。我们估计，在各区之间均衡警察资历将使芝加哥的整体暴力犯罪率降低4.6%，警察使用武力减少10%。各社区之间在犯罪和警察使用武力方面的不平等也将大幅下降。考虑到警察的偏好，我们表明这种分配可以在收入中性的方式下实现，同时为警察带来小幅福利收益，这意味着它既更公平也更有效率。
29243.meta: Programs：LE, LS, PE；JEL：H4, H72, J3, K4, K42

29242.title: Semiparametric Estimation of Treatment Effects in Randomized Experiments
29242.zh_title: 随机实验中处理效应的半参数估计
29242.authors: Susan Athey, Peter J. Bickel, Aiyou Chen, Guido Imbens, Michael Pollmann
29242.abstract: We develop new semiparametric methods for estimating treatment effects. We focus on a setting where the outcome distributions may be thick tailed, where treatment effects are small, where sample sizes are large and where assignment is completely random. This setting is of particular interest in recent experimentation in tech companies. We propose using parametric models for the treatment effects, as opposed to parametric models for the full outcome distributions. This leads to semiparametric models for the outcome distributions. We derive the semiparametric efficiency bound for this setting, and propose efficient estimators. In the case with a constant treatment effect one of the proposed estimators has an interesting interpretation as a weighted average of quantile treatment effects, with the weights proportional to (minus) the second derivative of the log of the density of the potential outcomes. Our analysis also results in an extension of Huber's model and trimmed mean to include asymmetry and a simplified condition on linear combinations of order statistics, which may be of independent interest.
29242.zh_abstract: 我们开发了用于估计处理效应的新半参数方法。我们关注一个设定，其中结果分布可能具有厚尾，处理效应较小，样本量较大，且分配是完全随机的。这一设定在科技公司近期的实验中特别受关注。我们建议对处理效应使用参数模型，而不是对完整的结果分布使用参数模型。这导致了结果分布的半参数模型。我们推导了该设定的半参数效率界，并提出了有效估计量。在常数处理效应的情况下，其中一个提出的估计量具有一个有趣的解释，即作为分位数处理效应的加权平均值，其权重与潜在结果密度对数的二阶导数成比例。我们的分析还导致了Huber模型和修剪均值的扩展，以包含不对称性，并简化了关于顺序统计量线性组合的条件，这可能具有独立的意义。

29241.title: The Great Divide: Education, Despair and Death
29241.zh_title: 大分裂：教育、绝望与死亡
29241.abstract: Deaths of despair, morbidity and emotional distress continue to rise in the US. The increases are largely borne by those without a four-year college degree—the majority of American adults. For many less-educated Americans, the economy and society are no longer providing the basis for a good life. Concurrently, all-cause mortality in the US is diverging by education—falling for the college-educated and rising for those without a degree—something not seen in other rich countries. We review the rising prevalence of pain, despair, and suicide among Americans without a BA. Pain and despair created a baseline demand for opioids, but the escalation of addiction came from pharma and its political enablers. We examine “the politics of despair,” how less-educated people have abandoned and been abandoned by the Democratic Party. While healthier states once voted Republican in presidential elections, now the least-healthy states do. We review the evidence on whether or not deaths of despair have risen during the COVID pandemic. More broadly, excess mortality from COVID has not increased the ratio of all-cause mortality rates for those with and without a four-year degree, but has instead replicated the pre-existing mortality ratio.
29241.zh_abstract: 在美国，绝望之死、发病率和情绪困扰持续上升。这些增长主要由没有四年制大学学位的群体——即大多数美国成年人——承受。对于许多受教育程度较低的美国人而言，经济和社会已不再提供美好生活的基础。与此同时，美国全因死亡率因教育程度而出现分化：大学学历者的死亡率下降，而无学位者的死亡率上升——这在其他富裕国家并未出现。我们回顾了没有学士学位的美国人中疼痛、绝望和自杀率上升的现象。疼痛和绝望为阿片类药物创造了基本需求，但成瘾问题的升级源于制药业及其政治支持者。我们考察了“绝望的政治”，即受教育程度较低的群体如何抛弃并被民主党抛弃。过去，健康状况较好的州在总统选举中支持共和党，而现在，健康状况最差的州反而支持共和党。我们评估了在新冠疫情期间绝望之死是否上升的证据。更广泛地说，新冠疫情导致的超额死亡率并未提高有四年制学位和无学位者之间全因死亡率之比，而是复制了既有的死亡率差距。

29240.title: The Affordable Care Act After a Decade: Its Impact on the Labor Market and the Macro Economy
29240.zh_title: 十年后的《平价医疗法案》：对劳动力市场和宏观经济的影响
29240.abstract: The Affordable Care Act (ACA) is one of the most important reforms of the US health insurance system since the introduction of Medicare. Since employment is a main source of health insurance for the working age population in the United States, this sweeping health insurance reform also has important implications for the labor market and the macro economy. In this paper, we survey the prototype models that are used in the macro and labor literature, extended to integrate health and health insurance, to study the short- and long-run consequences of the ACA. We also suggest open areas for future research.
29240.zh_abstract: 《平价医疗法案》（ACA）是自医疗保险制度引入以来美国医疗保险体系最重要的改革之一。由于就业是美国劳动年龄人口获得医疗保险的主要来源，这项全面的医疗保险改革也对劳动力市场和宏观经济产生了重要影响。在本文中，我们综述了宏观和劳动经济学文献中使用的原型模型，这些模型通过整合健康和医疗保险来研究ACA的短期和长期后果。我们还提出了未来研究的开放领域。
29240.meta: Programs：EFG, EH, LS, PE；JEL：E62, H51, I1, I13, I18, J33

29239.title: Flagship Entry in Online Marketplaces
29239.zh_title: 在线市场中的旗舰店入驻
29239.authors: Ginger Zhe Jin, Zhentong Lu, Xiaolu Zhou, Lu Fang
29239.abstract: In this paper, we empirically study how flagship entry in an online marketplace affects consumers, the platform, and various sellers on the platform. We find flagship entry may benefit consumers by expanding the choice set, by intensifying price competition within the entry brand, and by improving consumer perception for parts of the platform. In the meantime, flagship entry cannibalizes the sales of same-brand sellers, while other brands may gain as the buyer base expands on the platform. Counterfactual simulation suggests that flagship entry improves the gross merchandise value (GMV) of the platform and overall consumer welfare in most cases.
29239.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们实证研究了在线市场中旗舰店入驻如何影响消费者、平台以及平台上的各类卖家。我们发现，旗舰店入驻可能通过扩大选择范围、加剧入驻品牌内的价格竞争以及改善消费者对平台部分区域的认知来使消费者受益。同时，旗舰店入驻会蚕食同品牌卖家的销售额，而其他品牌可能因平台买家基础的扩大而获益。反事实模拟表明，在大多数情况下，旗舰店入驻会提高平台的商品交易总额（GMV）和整体消费者福利。

29238.title: The Flight to Safety and International Risk Sharing
29238.zh_title: 避险行为与国际风险分担
29238.abstract: We study a business cycle model of the international monetary system featuring a time-varying demand for safe dollar bonds, greater risk-bearing capacity in the U.S. than the rest of the world, and nominal rigidities. A flight to safety generates a dollar appreciation and decline in global output. Dollar bonds thus command a negative risk premium and the U.S. holds a levered portfolio of capital financed in dollars. We quantify the effects of safety shocks and heterogeneity in risk-bearing capacity for global macroeconomic volatility; U.S. external adjustment; and policy transmission, as of dollar swap lines.
29238.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一个国际货币体系的商业周期模型，该模型具有随时间变化的美元安全资产需求、美国相对于世界其他地区更强的风险承担能力以及名义刚性。避险行为导致美元升值和全球产出下降。因此，美元债券具有负风险溢价，美国持有以美元融资的资本杠杆组合。我们量化了安全冲击和风险承担能力异质性对全球宏观经济波动、美国外部调整以及政策传导（如美元互换额度）的影响。
29238.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：E44, F44, G15

29237.title: Using Satellite Imagery and Machine Learning to Estimate the Livelihood Impact of Electricity Access
29237.zh_title: 利用卫星图像和机器学习估算电力接入对生计的影响
29237.authors: Nathan Ratledge, Gabriel Cadamuro, Brandon De la Cuesta, Matthieu Stigler, Marshall Burke
29237.abstract: In many regions of the world, sparse data on key economic outcomes inhibits the development, targeting, and evaluation of public policy. We demonstrate how advancements in satellite imagery and machine learning can help ameliorate these data and inference challenges. In the context of an expansion of the electrical grid across Uganda, we show how a combination of satellite imagery and computer vision can be used to develop local-level livelihood measurements appropriate for inferring the causal impact of electricity access on livelihoods. We then show how ML-based inference techniques deliver more reliable estimates of the causal impact of electrification than traditional alternatives when applied to these data. We estimate that grid access improves village-level asset wealth in rural Uganda by 0.17 standard deviations, more than doubling the growth rate over our study period relative to untreated areas. Our results provide country-scale evidence on the impact of a key infrastructure investment, and provide a low-cost, generalizable approach to future policy evaluation in data sparse environments.
29237.zh_abstract: 在世界许多地区，关键经济结果数据的匮乏阻碍了公共政策的制定、瞄准和评估。我们展示了卫星图像和机器学习的进步如何帮助缓解这些数据和推断挑战。在乌干达电网扩张的背景下，我们展示了如何利用卫星图像和计算机视觉相结合的方法，开发出适合推断电力接入对生计因果影响的本地级生计测量指标。然后，我们展示了基于机器学习的推断技术应用于这些数据时，如何比传统替代方法提供更可靠的电力接入因果影响估计。我们估计，电网接入使乌干达农村地区的村级资产财富提高了0.17个标准差，相对于未处理地区，研究期间的增长率翻了一番以上。我们的结果为一项关键基础设施投资的影响提供了国家层面的证据，并为未来数据稀疏环境下的政策评估提供了一种低成本、可推广的方法。

29236.title: Repricing Avalanches in the Billion-Prices Data
29236.zh_title: 十亿价格数据中的重新定价雪崩
29236.authors: Laura Leal, Haaris Mateen, Makoto Nirei, José A. Scheinkman
29236.abstract: Nirei and Scheinkman (2021) proposed an equilibrium model of price adjustments with menu-costs with a finite number of firms and derived a “reproduction number” for repricing and a limit functional form for the distribution of the number of simultaneously price-adjusting firms. We show that the distribution of price-changes in data from the Billion Prices Project is well fitted by this functional form and exhibits a reproduction number that is close to unity, indicating that complementarity in price-changes plays a major role in repricings.
29236.zh_abstract: Nirei和Scheinkman（2021）提出了一个具有菜单成本且包含有限数量企业的价格调整均衡模型，并推导出了重新定价的“再生数”以及同时调整价格的企业数量分布的极限函数形式。我们表明，来自十亿价格项目（Billion Prices Project）数据中的价格变化分布与该函数形式拟合良好，并且其再生数接近1，这表明价格变化中的互补性在重新定价中起着主要作用。

29235.title: Energy and Environmental Markets, Industrial Organization, and Regulation
29235.zh_title: 能源与环境市场、产业组织与监管
29235.abstract: This paper discusses contributions that industrial organization economists have made to our understanding of energy markets and environmental regulation. We emphasize the substantive contributions of recent papers while also highlighting how this literature has adopted and sometimes augmented theoretical and empirical tools from industrial organization. Many of the topics examined by this literature—especially auctions, investment, productivity and innovation, and regulation—also apply to a variety of settings beyond energy and the environment. We also indicate areas where future research is likely to be fruitful, with an emphasis on how industrial organization economists can help inform energy and environmental policies.
29235.zh_abstract: 本文讨论了产业组织经济学家对我们理解能源市场和环境监管所做的贡献。我们强调了近期论文的实质性贡献，同时指出了该文献如何采用并有时增强了产业组织中的理论和实证工具。该文献研究的许多主题——尤其是拍卖、投资、生产率和创新以及监管——也适用于能源和环境之外的多种情境。我们还指出了未来研究可能富有成果的领域，并强调了产业组织经济学家如何能够为能源和环境政策提供信息。
29235.meta: Programs：EEE, IO；JEL：L0, Q2, Q3, Q4, Q5

29234.title: Bundling Genetic and Financial Technologies for More Resilient and Productive Small-scale Agriculture
29234.zh_title: 捆绑遗传与金融技术以实现更具韧性和生产力的小规模农业
29234.authors: Stephen R. Boucher, Michael R. Carter, Jon Einar Flatnes, Travis J. Lybbert, Jonathan G. Malacarne, Paswel Marenya, Laura A. Paul
29234.abstract: Utilizing a multi-year, spatially diversified randomized controlled trial spanning two African countries, this paper explores whether bundled genetic and financial technologies can boost the resilience and productivity of small-scale farmers who are exposed to significant risk. The analysis shows that both moderate droughts and more severe yield losses undermine the resilience of control group households, and that these shocks have long-lasting effects as they decapitalize households who invest less in years following these shocks. Severe yield shocks also increase hunger and food insecurity. The genetic technology— drought tolerant seeds—provides significant protection against moderate drought events and mitigates the long-term drop in farm productivity seen in the control group. The financial technology—satellite-based index insurance—offsets the long-term consequences of severe yield losses that are not mitigated by the drought tolerant seeds. Finally, the analysis shows that farmers who experienced shocks and saw both technologies in action subsequently increase their agricultural investment at both the extensive and intensive margins. The technologies thus not only allow farmers to return to their pre-shock positions, but also allow them to move toward higher expected incomes. Unfortunately, this apparent experiential learning cuts both ways. Farmers who did not experience the efficacy of the risk management technologies backed away from using them in the following season. Our findings thus showcase important complementarities between genetic and financial risk mitigating technologies as well as the challenge of inducing sustained uptake of technologies that only occasionally reveal their benefits.
29234.zh_abstract: 利用一项跨越两个非洲国家、多年期、空间多样化的随机对照试验，本文探讨了捆绑的遗传和金融技术能否提高面临重大风险的小规模农户的韧性和生产力。分析表明，中度干旱和更严重的产量损失都削弱了对照组家庭的韧性，并且这些冲击具有长期影响，因为它们使家庭资本减少，导致这些家庭在冲击后的年份投资减少。严重的产量冲击还会增加饥饿和粮食不安全。遗传技术——耐旱种子——对中度干旱事件提供了显著保护，并缓解了对照组中观察到的长期农业生产力下降。金融技术——基于卫星的指数保险——抵消了耐旱种子无法缓解的严重产量损失的长期后果。最后，分析表明，经历过冲击并看到这两种技术实际效果的农民随后在广度和深度上都增加了农业投资。因此，这些技术不仅使农民能够恢复到冲击前的状态，还使他们能够迈向更高的预期收入。不幸的是，这种经验学习是双向的。没有体验到风险管理技术效用的农民在接下来的季节中放弃了使用它们。因此，我们的研究结果展示了遗传和金融风险缓解技术之间的重要互补性，以及诱导持续采用那些仅偶尔显现效益的技术所面临的挑战。

29232.title: Measuring Market Expectations
29232.abstract: Asset prices are a valuable source of information about financial market participants' expectations about key macroeconomic variables. However, the presence of time-varying risk premia requires an adjustment of market prices to obtain the market's rational assessment of future price and policy developments. This paper reviews empirical approaches for recovering market-based expectations. It starts by laying out the two canonical modeling frameworks that form the backbone for estimating risk premia and highlights the proliferation of risk pricing factors that result in a wide range of different asset-price-based expectation measures. It then describes a key methodological innovation to evaluate the empirical plausibility of risk premium estimates and to identify the most accurate market-based expectation measure. The usefulness of this general approach is illustrated for price expectations in the global oil market. Then, the paper provides an overview of the body of empirical evidence for monetary policy and inflation expectations with a special emphasis on market-specific characteristics that complicate the quest for the best possible market-based expectation measure. Finally, it discusses a number of economic applications where market expectations play a key role for evaluating economic models, guiding policy analysis, and deriving shock measures.
29232.zh_abstract: 资产价格是关于金融市场参与者对关键宏观经济变量预期的宝贵信息来源。然而，时变风险溢价的存在要求对市场价格进行调整，以获得市场对未来价格和政策发展的理性评估。本文回顾了恢复基于市场的预期的实证方法。首先阐述了构成估计风险溢价基础的两个经典建模框架，并强调了风险定价因素的激增，这些因素导致了各种不同的基于资产价格的预期衡量指标。然后描述了一项关键的方法论创新，用于评估风险溢价估计的实证合理性，并识别最准确的基于市场的预期衡量指标。以全球石油市场的价格预期为例，说明了这种通用方法的实用性。接着，本文概述了关于货币政策和通胀预期的实证证据，特别关注那些使寻找最佳基于市场的预期衡量指标复杂化的市场特定特征。最后，讨论了市场预期在评估经济模型、指导政策分析和推导冲击衡量指标中发挥关键作用的一系列经济应用。
29232.meta: Programs：AP, EEE, ME；JEL：C52, E31, E43, E52, G14, Q43

29231.title: Does Education Prevent Job Loss During Downturns? Evidence from Exogenous School Assignments and COVID-19 in Barbados
29231.zh_title: 教育能否在经济低迷时期防止失业？来自巴巴多斯外生学校分配和COVID-19的证据
29231.authors: Diether W. Beuermann, Nicolas L. Bottan, Bridget Hoffmann, C. Kirabo Jackson, Diego A. Vera Cossio
29231.abstract: Canonical human capital theories posit that education, by enhancing worker skills, reduces the likelihood that a worker will be laid-off during times of economic change. Yet, this has not been demonstrated causally. We link administrative education records from 1987 through 2002 to nationally representative surveys conducted before and after COVID-19 onset in Barbados to explore the causal impact of improved education on job loss during this period. Using a regression discontinuity (RD) design, we show that females (but not males) who score just above the admission threshold for more selective secondary schools attain more years of education than those that scored just below (essentially holding initial ability fixed). We then find that these same females are much less likely to have lost a job after the onset of COVID-19. We show that these effects are not driven by labor supply decisions, fertility or access to child care, or selection into more resilient sectors and occupations. Because employers observe incumbent worker productivity, these patterns are inconsistent with pure education signaling, and suggest that education enhances worker skill.
29231.zh_abstract: 经典的人力资本理论认为，教育通过提升工人技能，降低了工人在经济变革时期被解雇的可能性。然而，这一点尚未得到因果证明。我们将1987年至2002年的行政教育记录与巴巴多斯COVID-19爆发前后进行的全国代表性调查联系起来，探讨在此期间教育改善对失业的因果影响。使用断点回归设计，我们表明，在更具选择性的中学录取分数线以上（相对于以下）的女性（而非男性）获得了更多年的教育（本质上控制了初始能力）。然后我们发现，这些相同的女性在COVID-19爆发后失业的可能性要小得多。我们表明，这些效应并非由劳动力供给决策、生育率或儿童保育的可及性，或进入更具韧性的部门和职业的选择所驱动。由于雇主可以观察到在职工人的生产力，这些模式与纯粹的教育信号传递不一致，并表明教育提升了工人的技能。
29231.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS, PE；JEL：H0, I2, J0

29230.title: Media and Social Capital
29230.authors: Filipe R. Campante, Ruben Durante, Andrea Tesei
29230.abstract: We survey the empirical literature in economics on the impact of media technologies on social capital. Motivated by a simple model of information and collective action, we cover a range of different outcomes related to social capital, from social and political participation to interpersonal trust, in its benign and destructive manifestations. The impact of media technologies hinges on their content ("information" vs "entertainment"), their effectiveness in fostering coordination, and the networks they create, as well as individual characteristics and media consumption choices.
29230.zh_abstract: 我们调查了经济学中关于媒体技术对社会资本影响的实证文献。受一个简单的信息与集体行动模型的启发，我们涵盖了与社会资本相关的各种不同结果，从社会和政治参与，到人际信任，包括其良性及破坏性的表现形式。媒体技术的影响取决于其内容（“信息”与“娱乐”）、其在促进协调方面的有效性、它们所创造的网络，以及个体特征和媒体消费选择。
29230.meta: Programs：POL；JEL：D71, D72, D74, D83, D84, Z13

29229.title: An Industrial Organization Perspective on Productivity
29229.zh_title: 生产率研究的产业组织视角
29229.abstract: This chapter overviews productivity research from an industrial organization perspective. We focus on what is known and what still needs to be learned about the productivity levels and dynamics of individual producers, but also how these interact through markets and industries to influence productivity aggregates. We overview productivity concepts, facts, data, measurement, analysis, and open questions.
29229.zh_abstract: 本章从产业组织视角概述了生产率研究。我们关注关于单个生产者的生产率水平和动态已知和仍需了解的内容，同时也关注这些生产者如何通过市场和产业相互作用，从而影响生产率总量。我们概述了生产率的概念、事实、数据、衡量、分析和未解决的问题。

29228.title: Road Capacity, Domestic Trade and Regional Outcomes
29228.zh_title: 道路容量、国内贸易与区域经济结果
29228.authors: A. Kerem Coşar, Banu Demir, Devaki Ghose, Nathaniel Young
29228.abstract: What is the impact on intra-national trade and regional economic outcomes when the quality and lane-capacity of an existing paved road network is expanded significantly? We investigate this question for the case of Turkey, which undertook a large-scale public investment in roads during the 2000s. Using spatially disaggregated data on road upgrades and domestic transactions, we estimate a large positive impact of reduced travel times on trade as well as local manufacturing employment and wages. A quantitative exercise using a workhorse model of spatial equilibrium implies heterogeneous effects across locations, with aggregate real income gains reaching 2-3 percent in the long-run. Reductions in travel times increased local employment-to-population ratio but had no effect on local population. We extend the model by endogenizing the labor supply decision to capture this finding. The model-implied elasticity of employment rates to travel time reductions captures about one-third of the empirical elasticity.
29228.zh_abstract: 当现有铺装道路网络的质量和车道容量得到显著扩展时，对国内贸易和区域经济结果有何影响？我们以土耳其为例研究这个问题，土耳其在2000年代进行了大规模的道路公共投资。使用关于道路升级和国内交易的空间细化数据，我们估计了旅行时间减少对贸易以及当地制造业就业和工资的显著正向影响。使用一个标准空间均衡模型进行的量化分析表明，不同地点的效应存在异质性，长期内实际总收入增长可达2-3%。旅行时间的减少提高了当地的就业人口比，但对当地人口没有影响。我们通过内生化劳动力供给决策来扩展模型，以捕捉这一发现。模型隐含的就业率对旅行时间减少的弹性，捕捉了约三分之一的实证弹性。

29227.title: The Impact of Financial Assistance Programs on Health Care Utilization
29227.zh_title: 财务援助项目对医疗保健利用的影响
29227.authors: Alyce S. Adams, Raymond Kluender, Neale Mahoney, Jinglin Wang, Francis Wong, Wesley Yin
29227.abstract: Most hospitals and managed care organizations have financial assistance programs that aim to reduce financial burdens and improve health care access for low-income patients. We use administrative data from Kaiser Permanente to study the effects of financial assistance on health care utilization. Using a regression discontinuity design based on an income threshold for program eligibility, we find that financial assistance significantly increases health care utilization initially, though effects dissipate three quarters after program receipt. Financial assistance also increases the detection of and medication refills for treatment-sensitive conditions, suggesting financial assistance may increase receipt of high-value care.
29227.zh_abstract: 大多数医院和管理式医疗组织都有财务援助项目，旨在减轻低收入患者的财务负担并改善其医疗保健可及性。我们使用凯撒医疗集团的行政数据来研究财务援助对医疗保健利用的影响。使用基于项目资格收入阈值的断点回归设计，我们发现财务援助最初显著增加了医疗保健利用，尽管这种效应在获得项目援助三个季度后消失。财务援助还增加了对治疗敏感疾病的检测和药物续方，表明财务援助可能增加了高价值医疗服务的获得。
29227.meta: Programs：AG, EH, IO, LS, PE；JEL：I1, I18

29226.title: Stabilization with Fiscal Policy
29226.zh_title: 利用财政政策进行稳定
29226.abstract: I reconsider the long-standing consensus view that macroeconomic stabilization should rely on monetary policy, not fiscal policy. I use an analytically tractable heterogeneous agent New Keynesian (HANK) model that is parameterized so as to admit a bubble in public debt. In this context, I show that it is possible to stabilize either inflation or output in response to aggregate shocks by varying only fiscal policy (that is, lump-sum uniform transfers). In contrast, when the public debt bubble is large, it is impossible to stabilize either inflation or output by varying only interest rates (monetary policy).
29226.zh_abstract: 我重新审视了长期存在的共识观点，即宏观经济稳定应依赖货币政策而非财政政策。我使用一个解析上易于处理、参数化后允许公共债务存在泡沫的异质性代理人新凯恩斯模型。在此背景下，我表明，仅通过改变财政政策（即一次性统一转移支付），就有可能稳定对总冲击的反应中的通胀或产出。相反，当公共债务泡沫很大时，仅通过改变利率（货币政策）不可能稳定通胀或产出。

29225.title: Organizational Capacity and Profit Shifting
29225.abstract: Good organizational capacity drives productivity and potential taxable profits, but may also enable multinationals (MNEs) to more efficiently re-allocate profits across tax jurisdictions, lowering actual taxable profits. We show that MNE subsidiaries with better organizational capacity report significantly lower profits and have a higher incidence of bunching around zero reported profitability in high-tax countries. This pattern is not present in low-tax countries. Further, responsiveness to corporate tax rate changes in terms of profit reporting is driven by firms with good organizational capacity. We show our results are consistent with profit-shifting behavior and rule out key alternative channels.
29225.zh_abstract: 良好的组织能力驱动生产力和潜在应税利润，但也可能使跨国公司更有效地在税收管辖区之间重新分配利润，从而降低实际应税利润。我们表明，在高税收国家，组织能力较好的跨国公司子公司报告的利润显著较低，并且报告盈利水平在零附近聚集的发生率更高。这种模式在低税收国家并不存在。此外，在利润报告方面对企业所得税税率变化的反应性，是由组织能力良好的公司驱动的。我们表明，我们的结果与利润转移行为一致，并排除了其他关键替代渠道。

29224.title: Can Today's and Tomorrow's World Uniformly Gain from Carbon Taxation?
29224.zh_title: 当今与未来世界能否从碳税中普遍获益？
29224.authors: Laurence J. Kotlikoff, Felix Kubler, Andrey Polbin, Simon Scheidegger
29224.abstract: Climate change will impact current and future generations in different regions very differently. This paper develops the first large-scale, annually calibrated, multi-region, overlapping generations model of climate change and carbon policy. It features region-specific temperature and damage functions with the phased impact of emissions on global and regional temperature calibrated to the latest scientific evidence. Absent policy, climate change may, under high-damage scenarios, dramatically reduce GDP in most regions, with India, Brazil, and the South Asian Pacific suffering long-term catastrophic damages. Carbon taxation, coupled with region- and generation-specific transfers, can both correct the carbon externality and raise the welfare of all current and future agents across all regions by 4.3 percent. The impact on the use and duration of fossil fuels is dramatic as is the reduction in the path of global emissions. However, achieving completely uniform welfare gains leaves future generations in particular regions facing exceptionally high compensatory payments. Fortunately, a carbon tax-cum redistribution policy that limits this burden for any generation in any region to less than 10 percent, measured on a consumption-equivalent basis, can deliver a 4.0 percent or higher welfare gain for all peoplekind – present and future. However, carbon taxes set through time, at carbon’s marginal social cost, do far too little to mitigate climate change unless all major emitters, particularly China, adopt them and do so immediately.
29224.zh_abstract: 气候变化将对不同地区的当代和未来世代产生截然不同的影响。本文构建了首个大规模、年度校准、多区域、世代交叠的气候变化与碳政策模型。该模型具有区域特定的温度与损害函数，并将排放对全球及区域温度的阶段性影响校准至最新科学证据。在无政策情景下，气候变化在高损害情形中可能大幅降低多数地区的GDP，其中印度、巴西和南亚太平洋地区将遭受长期灾难性损失。碳税结合区域与世代特定的转移支付，既能纠正碳外部性，又能使所有地区当前及未来所有个体的福利提升4.3%。这对化石燃料的使用和持续时间以及全球排放路径的削减影响显著。然而，实现完全统一的福利收益要求特定地区的未来世代面临异常高的补偿支付。幸运的是，一种将任何地区任何世代这一负担限制在消费等价基准10%以内的碳税与再分配政策，可为全人类（包括现在和未来）带来4.0%或更高的福利增益。但是，除非所有主要排放国（尤其是中国）立即采用碳税，否则按碳边际社会成本随时间设定的碳税在减缓气候变化方面作用甚微。

29223.title: Misdiagnosing Bank Capital Problems
29223.authors: Jeremy I. Bulow, Paul D. Klemperer
29223.abstract: Banks’ reluctance to repair their balance sheets, combined with deposit insurance and regulatory forbearance in recognizing greater risks and losses, can lead to solvency problems that look like liquidity (bank-run) crises. Regulatory forbearance incentivizes banks to both retain risky loans and reject new good opportunities. With sufficient regulatory forbearance, partially-insured banks act exactly as if they are fully insured. Stress tests certify that uninsured creditors will be paid, not that banks are solvent, and have ambiguous effects on the efficiency of investment.
29223.meta: Programs：AP, CF, ME；JEL：G10, G21, G28, G32

29222.title: Maximum Employment and the Participation Cycle
29222.zh_title: 最大就业与参与率周期
29222.abstract: We investigate the source, magnitude, and unevenness of the procyclical forces that shape labor force participation, i.e., the participation cycle, which are important for the implementation of the maximum employment mandate. We show that these forces can be analyzed in real time using a flow decomposition of the changes in the labor force participation rate. The decomposition reveals that the source of the participation cycle is fluctuations in job-loss and job-finding rates, rather than cyclical movements in labor force entry and exit rates. The magnitude of the participation cycle is large. Cyclical downward pressures on employment from participation are two-thirds that of unemployment. Moreover, the participation cycle delays the recovery in employment because it lags the unemployment cycle. It also amplifies the unevenness of the impact of recessions. Groups that see large increases in their unemployment rates also experience more pronounced participation cycles. Despite differences in their magnitudes, the source of the participation cycle is the same for all groups. Application of our method to the COVID-19 Recession suggests that, as of June 2021, the bulk of the drop in the participation rate since the onset of the pandemic is cyclical and that the cyclical recovery in participation likely will trail that of the unemployment rate.
29222.zh_abstract: 我们研究了塑造劳动力参与率的顺周期力量（即参与率周期）的来源、幅度和不均衡性，这些对于实施最大就业指令至关重要。我们表明，利用劳动力参与率变化的流量分解可以实时分析这些力量。分解揭示，参与率周期的来源是失业率和就业率的波动，而非劳动力进入和退出率的周期性变动。参与率周期的幅度很大。来自参与率的周期性就业下行压力是失业率的三分之二。此外，参与率周期延迟了就业复苏，因为它滞后于失业周期。它还放大了衰退影响的不均衡性。失业率大幅上升的群体也经历了更显著的参与率周期。尽管幅度存在差异，但所有群体的参与率周期来源相同。将我们的方法应用于COVID-19衰退表明，截至2021年6月，自疫情爆发以来参与率下降的大部分是周期性的，且参与率的周期性复苏可能落后于失业率。

29221.title: Big Fish in Thin Markets: Competing with the Middlemen to Increase Market Access in the Amazon
29221.zh_title: 薄市场中的大鱼：与中间商竞争以增加亚马逊地区的市场准入
29221.authors: Viva Ona Bartkus, Wyatt Brooks, Joseph P. Kaboski, Carolyn E. Pelnik
29221.abstract: Middlemen are ubiquitous in supply chains. In developing countries they help bring products from remote communities to end markets but may exert strong market power. We study a cooperative intervention which organizes together poor fishing communities in the Amazon — one of the poorest and most remote regions of the world — to purchase large boats in order to partially bypass middlemen and deliver their fish directly to market. We find that the intervention increases income by 27%, largely through an increase in price received, and also increases consumption. Moreover, the intervention is highly cost effective with the projected stream of income gains easily covering the cost of the investment. Finally, we formalize a model in which the market power of middlemen itself can create a poverty trap, which can be eliminated with cooperative investment.
29221.zh_abstract: 中间商在供应链中无处不在。在发展中国家，他们帮助将产品从偏远社区运往终端市场，但可能行使强大的市场势力。我们研究了一项合作干预措施，该措施将亚马逊地区（世界上最贫困和最偏远地区之一）的贫困渔业社区组织起来，共同购买大型船只，以部分绕过中间商，将鱼直接运往市场。我们发现，该干预措施使收入增加了27%，主要通过销售价格上涨实现，同时也增加了消费。此外，该干预措施具有很高的成本效益，预计的收入增长流很容易覆盖投资成本。最后，我们形式化了一个模型，其中中间商的市场势力本身可能造成贫困陷阱，而合作投资可以消除这一陷阱。

29220.title: Simulating Endogenous Global Automation
29220.zh_title: 模拟内生性全球自动化
29220.authors: Seth G. Benzell, Laurence J. Kotlikoff, Guillermo LaGarda, Victor Yifan Ye
29220.abstract: This paper develops a 17-region, 3-skill group, overlapping generations, computable general equilibrium model to evaluate the global consequences of automation. Automation, modeled as capital- and high-skill biased technological change, is endogenous with regions adopting new technologies when profitable. Our approach captures and quantifies key macro implications of a range of foundational models of automation. In our baseline scenario, automation has a moderate effect on regional outputs and a small effect on world interest rates. However, it has a major impact on inequality, both wage inequality within regions and per capita GDP inequality across regions. We examine two policy responses to technological change -- mandating use of the advanced technology and providing universal basic income to share gains from automation. The former policy can raise a region's output, but at a welfare cost. The latter policy can transform automation into a win-win for all generations in a region.
29220.zh_abstract: 本文开发了一个包含17个地区、3个技能组别、世代交叠的可计算一般均衡模型，以评估自动化的全球后果。自动化被建模为资本和高技能偏向的技术变革，当新技术有利可图时，各地区会内生地采用。我们的方法捕捉并量化了一系列自动化基础模型的关键宏观含义。在基准情景中，自动化对区域产出的影响适中，对世界利率的影响较小。然而，它对不平等有重大影响，包括区域内工资不平等和区域间人均GDP不平等。我们考察了两种应对技术变革的政策——强制使用先进技术和提供全民基本收入以分享自动化收益。前一种政策可以提高区域产出，但会带来福利成本。后一种政策可以将自动化转化为区域内所有世代的共赢。
29220.meta: Programs：DAE, DEV, ITI, PR；JEL：E1, E23, F43, O31, O33, O4, O41

29219.title: The Effects of Going Public on Firm Performance and Commercialization Strategy: Evidence from International IPOs
29219.zh_title: 上市对公司绩效和商业化战略的影响：来自国际IPO的证据
29219.authors: Borja Larrain, Gordon M. Phillips, Giorgo Sertsios, Francisco Urzúa
29219.abstract: We study the effects of going public using a unique panel of firms in 16 European countries for which we observe financial data before and after firms' initial-public-offering (IPO) attempts. We compare firms that complete their IPO with firms that withdraw their IPO. We instrument the going public decision using prior market returns. We find that firm profitability goes up after going public—contrary to previous results in the literature. We also find an post-IPO expansion in the number of subsidiaries and countries in which IPO firms operate. Our results are stronger for firms in financially dependent industries and in countries with higher investor protection consistent with going public relaxing financial constraints and with a stronger impact when agency conflicts are lower. Overall, our results are consistent with going public inducing a shift towards a strategy of commercialization to increase profitability.
29219.zh_abstract: 我们利用一个独特的16个欧洲国家公司面板数据来研究上市的影响，该数据观察了公司在首次公开募股（IPO）尝试前后的财务数据。我们将完成IPO的公司与撤回IPO的公司进行比较。我们使用前期市场回报作为上市决策的工具变量。我们发现，公司上市后盈利能力上升——这与文献中先前的结果相反。我们还发现，IPO后，公司运营的子公司和国家数量有所扩张。我们的结果在金融依赖型行业的公司以及投资者保护程度较高的国家中更为显著，这与上市放松了金融约束以及代理冲突较低时影响更强的观点一致。总体而言，我们的结果与上市促使公司转向商业化战略以提高盈利能力的观点一致。

29278.title: The Consequences of Chronic Pain in Mid-Life: Evidence from the National Child Development Survey
29278.zh_title: 中年慢性疼痛的后果：来自英国全国儿童发展调查的证据
29278.abstract: Using data from all those born in a single week in 1958 in Britain we track the consequences of short pain and chronic pain in mid-life (age 44) on health, wellbeing and labor market outcomes in later life. We examine data taken at age 50 in 2008, when the Great Recession hit and then five years later at age 55 in 2013. We find those suffering both short-term and chronic pain at age 44 continue to report pain and poor general health in their 50s. However, the associations are much stronger for those with chronic pain. Furthermore, chronic pain at age 44 is associated with a range of poor mental health outcomes, pessimism about the future and joblessness at age 55 whereas short-duration pain at age 44 is not. Uniquely, we also show that pain experienced in childhood, at ages 11 and 16, reported by a parent and a teacher respectively, collected decades earlier, predicts pain in mid-life, indicating just how persistent pain can be over the life-course.
29278.zh_abstract: 利用1958年英国同一周内出生的所有人的数据，我们追踪了中年（44岁）短期疼痛和慢性疼痛对后期健康、福祉和劳动力市场结果的影响。我们考察了2008年（大衰退爆发时）50岁时的数据，以及五年后2013年55岁时的数据。我们发现，44岁时遭受短期和慢性疼痛的人，在50多岁时仍报告疼痛和总体健康状况不佳。然而，这种关联对于慢性疼痛者更为强烈。此外，44岁时的慢性疼痛与55岁时的一系列不良心理健康结果、对未来悲观以及失业相关，而44岁时的短期疼痛则不然。独特的是，我们还表明，童年时期（11岁和16岁）由父母和老师分别报告的疼痛，在数十年后收集的数据中，能预测中年疼痛，这表明疼痛在生命历程中可能具有极强的持续性。

29277.title: External Balance Sheets and the COVID-19 Crisis
29277.zh_title: 外部资产负债表与COVID-19危机
29277.abstract: At the onset of the COVID-19 economic crisis, as in other crisis episodes, the flight to safety was accompanied by a rapid appreciation of “safe haven” currencies. We quantify currency-induced balance sheet effects for total external positions as well as for individual asset classes using new data on the currency composition of cross-border stocks for 48 countries for the first quarter as well as for the full year 2020. We also conduct the stock-flow reconciliation of net international investment positions to measure overall valuation effects. We show that for many countries currency-induced valuation gains mitigated losses that resulted from declining asset prices in the first quarter of 2020. Moreover, for countries with excess capital out flows during this period, the impact on external balance sheet positions was mitigated by valuation gains. This is because, in contrast with past financial crises, many emerging markets did not experience negative external balance sheet effects from their currency depreciation, partly due to currency-induced valuation gains on equity positions offsetting losses on debt positions, partly due to reduced currency mismatch on their external debt positions.
29277.zh_abstract: 在COVID-19经济危机爆发之初，与其他危机时期一样，避险行为伴随着“避险”货币的快速升值。我们利用48个国家2020年第一季度及全年跨境存量的货币构成新数据，量化了总外部头寸以及各类资产因货币变动引起的资产负债表效应。我们还进行了净国际投资头寸的流量-存量调整，以衡量总体估值效应。我们表明，对于许多国家而言，2020年第一季度因货币变动产生的估值收益抵消了资产价格下跌造成的损失。此外，对于在此期间出现资本过度外流的国家，估值收益缓解了对外部资产负债表头寸的影响。这是因为，与以往的金融危机不同，许多新兴市场并未因本币贬值而遭受负面的外部资产负债表效应，部分原因是股权头寸的货币估值收益抵消了债务头寸的损失，部分原因是其外债头寸的货币错配有所减少。

29276.title: The Returns to College(s): Relative Value-Added and Match Effects in Higher Education
29276.zh_title: 大学（教育）的回报：高等教育的相对增值与匹配效应
29276.abstract: Students who attend different colleges in the U.S. end up with vastly different economic outcomes. We study the role of relative value-added across colleges within student choice sets in producing these outcome disparities. Linking high school, college, and earnings registries spanning the state of Texas, we identify relative college value-added by comparing the outcomes of students who apply to and are admitted by the same set of institutions, as this approach strikingly balances observable student potential across college treatments and renders our extensive set of covariates irrelevant as controls. Methodologically, we develop a framework for identifying and interpreting value-added under varying assumptions about match effects and sorting gains. Empirically, we estimate a relatively tight, though non-degenerate, distribution of relative value-added across the wide diversity of Texas public universities. Selectivity poorly predicts value-added within student choice sets, with only a fleeting selectivity earnings premium fading to zero after a few years in the labor market. Non-peer college inputs like instructional spending more strongly predict value-added, especially conditional on selectivity. Colleges that boost BA completion, especially in STEM majors, also tend to boost earnings. Finally, we probe the potential for (mis)match effects by allowing value-added schedules to vary by student characteristics.
29276.zh_abstract: 在美国，就读不同大学的学生最终获得的经济结果差异巨大。我们研究了学生选择集内大学间相对增值在产生这些结果差异中的作用。通过链接涵盖德克萨斯州的高中、大学和收入登记数据，我们通过比较申请并被同一组院校录取的学生的结果来识别相对大学增值，因为这种方法显著平衡了不同大学处理组中学生的可观测潜力，并使我们广泛使用的协变量作为控制变量变得无关紧要。在方法论上，我们建立了一个框架，用于在关于匹配效应和分类收益的不同假设下识别和解释增值。在实证上，我们估计了德克萨斯州公立大学多样性中相对增值的分布，该分布虽然非退化，但相对紧凑。在选择集内，选择性对增值的预测能力较差，仅存在短暂的选择性收入溢价，在劳动力市场几年后便降至零。非同伴大学投入（如教学支出）更能预测增值，尤其是在控制选择性后。那些能提高学士学位完成率（尤其是STEM专业）的大学也倾向于提高收入。最后，我们通过允许增值计划随学生特征变化，探讨了（错）匹配效应的可能性。
29276.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS, PE；JEL：C21, H75, I23, I24, I26, J24, J31, J62

29275.title: Diverse Policy Committees Can Reach Underrepresented Groups
29275.zh_title: 多元化的政策委员会能够触及代表性不足的群体
29275.authors: Francesco D’Acunto, Andreas Fuster, Michael Weber
29275.abstract: Increasing the diversity of policy committees has taken center stage worldwide, but whether and why diverse committees are more effective is still unclear. In a randomized control trial that varies the salience of female and minority representation on the Federal Reserve’s monetary policy committee, the FOMC, we test whether diversity affects how Fed information influences consumers’ subjective beliefs. Women and Black respondents form unemployment expectations more in line with FOMC forecasts and trust the Fed more after this intervention. Women are also more likely to acquire Fed-related information when associated with a female official. White men, who are overrepresented on the FOMC, do not react negatively. Heterogeneous taste for diversity can explain these patterns better than homophily. Our results suggest more diverse policy committees are better able to reach underrepresented groups without inducing negative reactions by others, thereby enhancing the effectiveness of policy communication and public trust in the institution.
29275.zh_abstract: 提高政策委员会的多元化已成为全球焦点，但多元化委员会是否以及为何更有效仍不清楚。在一项随机对照试验中，我们通过改变美联储货币政策委员会（FOMC）中女性和少数族裔代表的显著性，测试了多元化是否影响美联储信息对消费者主观信念的作用。在此干预后，女性和黑人受访者形成的失业预期更符合FOMC预测，并且对美联储的信任度更高。当信息与女性官员相关联时，女性也更有可能获取与美联储相关的信息。在FOMC中代表性过高的白人男性并未产生负面反应。对多元化的异质性偏好比同质性更能解释这些模式。我们的结果表明，更多元化的政策委员会能够更好地触及代表性不足的群体，而不会引发其他人的负面反应，从而增强政策沟通的有效性和公众对机构的信任。
29275.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, ME；JEL：D84, E52, E58, E70, G53

29274.title: Salience
29274.authors: Pedro Bordalo, Nicola Gennaioli, Andrei Shleifer
29274.abstract: We review the fast-growing work on salience and economic behavior. Psychological research shows that salient stimuli attract human attention “bottom up” due to their high contrast with surroundings, their surprising nature relative to recalled experiences, or their prominence. The Bordalo, Gennaioli and Shleifer (2012, 2013, 2020) models of salience show how bottom up attention can distort economic choice by distracting decision makers from their immediate goals or from certain choice attributes. We show that this approach explains many puzzles: separately treated departures from “rationality” such as probability weighting, menu effects, reference point effects, and framing, emerge as distinct manifestations of the same principle of bottom up attention to salient stimuli. We highlight new predictions and discuss open conceptual questions, as well as potential applications in finance, industrial organization, advertising, and politics.
29274.zh_abstract: 我们回顾了关于显著性与经济行为的快速发展的研究。心理学研究表明，显著的刺激物因其与周围环境的高对比度、相对于回忆经验的令人惊讶的性质或突出性，而“自下而上”地吸引人类注意力。Bordalo、Gennaioli和Shleifer（2012、2013、2020）的显著性模型展示了自下而上的注意力如何通过分散决策者对其直接目标或某些选择属性的注意力来扭曲经济选择。我们表明，这种方法解释了许多谜题：那些被单独处理的偏离“理性”的行为，如概率加权、菜单效应、参考点效应和框架效应，都表现为对显著刺激物自下而上注意力的同一原则的不同表现形式。我们强调了新的预测，并讨论了开放的概念性问题，以及在金融、产业组织、广告和政治中的潜在应用。

29273.title: Memory and Probability
29273.authors: Pedro Bordalo, John J. Conlon, Nicola Gennaioli, Spencer Yongwook Kwon, Andrei Shleifer
29273.abstract: People often estimate probabilities, such as the likelihood that an insurable risk will materialize or that an Irish person has red hair, by retrieving experiences from memory. We present a model of this process based on two established regularities of selective recall: similarity and interference. The model accounts for and reconciles a variety of conflicting empirical findings, such as overestimation of unlikely events when these are cued vs. neglect of non-cued ones, the availability heuristic, the representativeness heuristic, as well as over vs. underreaction to information in different situations. The model makes new predictions on how the content of a hypothesis (not just its objective probability) affects probability assessments by shaping the ease of recall. We experimentally evaluate these predictions and find strong experimental support.
29273.zh_abstract: 人们通常通过从记忆中检索经验来估计概率，例如可保风险发生的可能性或爱尔兰人拥有红头发的概率。我们基于选择性回忆的两个既定规律——相似性和干扰——提出了一个关于此过程的模型。该模型解释并调和了各种相互矛盾的实证发现，例如当罕见事件被提示时的高估与非提示事件的忽视、可得性启发式、代表性启发式，以及在不同情境下对信息的过度反应与反应不足。该模型做出了新的预测，即假设的内容（而不仅仅是其客观概率）如何通过塑造回忆的难易程度来影响概率评估。我们通过实验评估了这些预测，并发现了强有力的实验支持。

29272.title: Red Scare? A Study of Ethnic Prejudice in the Prosecutions under the Economic Espionage Act
29272.zh_title: 红色恐慌？《经济间谍法》起诉中的种族偏见研究
29272.abstract: We empirically test whether the Department of Justice (DOJ) engages in ethnic prejudice against Chinese in its prosecutorial decisions under the Economic Espionage Act (EEA) of 1996. Using data of EEA cases from November 1996 to June 2021, we conduct Becker's outcome test for evidence of ethnic prejudice. We find that Chinese-named defendants were more likely to be dismissed by trial or acquitted by jury, and were found guilty on fewer counts, and on average received harsher indictments. These results are robust regardless of whether we consider all cases or only arguably ``marginal'' cases. We also find that, for those publicly listed victim firms whose trade secrets were allegedly stolen by the charged defendants, the stock market reaction was much more muted to the news on the case filing date if the charged defendants are of Chinese descent. Our study provides the first systematic evidence that the DOJ's prosecutorial decisions in the application of the EEA may have been tainted by ethnic prejudice against Chinese, including American citizens of Chinese descent.
29272.zh_abstract: 我们实证检验了司法部在1996年《经济间谍法》下的起诉决定中是否对华人存在种族偏见。利用1996年11月至2021年6月期间EEA案件的数据，我们进行了贝克尔结果检验以寻找种族偏见的证据。我们发现，具有中文姓名的被告更有可能在审判中被驳回或由陪审团宣告无罪，被判有罪的罪名数量更少，并且平均受到更严厉的起诉。无论我们考虑所有案件还是仅考虑可能属于“边缘”的案件，这些结果都是稳健的。我们还发现，对于声称被指控被告窃取了商业秘密的公开上市受害公司，如果被指控被告是华裔，股票市场在案件立案日期对该消息的反应要弱得多。我们的研究首次提供了系统性证据，表明司法部在适用EEA时的起诉决定可能受到了针对华人（包括华裔美国公民）的种族偏见的影响。

29271.title: Life Course Effects Of The Lanham Preschools: What The First Government Preschool Effort Can Tell Us About Universal Early Care And Education Today
29271.zh_title: 兰汉姆学前教育的生命周期效应：首个政府学前教育努力对当今普遍早期保育与教育的启示
29271.authors: Taletha M. Derrington, Alison Huang, Joseph P. Ferrie
29271.abstract: We examine the effects WWII Lanham Act Nursery Schools (LNS) on high school and young adult educational and labor outcomes of participants in the landmark Project Talent (PT) study. All PT places that received funding for LNS schools and all PT places that did not were identified by examining program records and contemporaneous newspaper accounts. Focusing on students who in 1960 attended high school in the same city or town where they were born, we estimate intent to treat effects of access to LNS preschool on high school academic and social emotional outcomes and on educational attainment and labor outcomes at five and eleven years following high school graduation. Preschool boosts high school academic outcomes for men and (in at least one specification) income 11 years after high school graduation. For women, preschool exposure had a negative effect on some social emotional outcomes in high school. We found no or inconsistent effects for other outcomes. The Lanham experience demonstrates that even with the less sophisticated understanding of child development of the early 1940s, the first universal, government-funded preschool program had positive impacts on boys’ outcomes at least through high school. Given today’s expanded understanding of child development and focus on the quality of early care and education programming, these findings provide some optimism as communities, states, and the federal government contemplate expanding funding for today’s early learning environments.
29271.zh_abstract: 我们研究了二战期间《兰汉姆法案》托儿所对具有里程碑意义的“人才项目”研究中参与者的高中和青年时期教育及劳动成果的影响。通过检查项目记录和同时期的报纸报道，我们识别了所有获得LNS学校资助的PT地点和所有未获得资助的PT地点。聚焦于1960年在其出生城市或城镇就读高中的学生，我们估算了接触LNS学前教育的意向处理效应，这些效应体现在高中学术和社会情感成果，以及高中毕业后五年和十一年的教育成就和劳动成果上。学前教育提高了男性的高中学术成果，并在至少一个规格中提高了高中毕业11年后的收入。对于女性，接触学前教育对高中时期的一些社会情感成果产生了负面影响。我们发现对其他成果没有影响或影响不一致。兰汉姆的经验表明，即使对儿童发展的理解不如20世纪40年代早期那样成熟，第一个普遍的、政府资助的学前教育项目至少对男孩的成果产生了积极影响，直至高中。鉴于当今对儿童发展的理解更加深入，并且更加关注早期保育和教育项目的质量，这些发现为社区、州和联邦政府在考虑扩大对当今早期学习环境的资助时提供了一些乐观情绪。
29271.meta: Programs：CH, DAE, ED, LS；JEL：I21, I26, J13, N32

29270.title: Measuring the Welfare Cost of Asymmetric Information in Consumer Credit Markets
29270.zh_title: 衡量消费者信贷市场中信息不对称的福利成本
29270.authors: Anthony A. DeFusco, Huan Tang, Constantine Yannelis
29270.abstract: Information asymmetries are known in theory to lead to inefficiently low credit provision, yet empirical estimates of the resulting welfare losses are scarce. This paper leverages a randomized experiment conducted by a large fintech lender to estimate welfare losses arising from asymmetric information in the market for online consumer credit. Building on methods from the insurance literature, we show how exogenous variation in interest rates can be used to estimate borrower demand and lender cost curves and recover implied welfare losses. While asymmetric information generates large equilibrium price distortions, we find only small overall welfare losses, particularly for high-credit-score borrowers.
29270.zh_abstract: 理论上已知信息不对称会导致信贷供给效率低下，但由此产生的福利损失的实证估计却很少。本文利用一家大型金融科技贷款机构进行的随机实验，来估计在线消费者信贷市场中因信息不对称而产生的福利损失。基于保险文献中的方法，我们展示了如何利用利率的外生变化来估计借款人的需求和贷款人的成本曲线，并恢复隐含的福利损失。虽然信息不对称导致了巨大的均衡价格扭曲，但我们发现总体福利损失很小，尤其是对于高信用评分的借款人。
29270.meta: Programs：CF, PE；JEL：D14, D82, G10, G23, G5

29269.title: The Geography of Unemployment
29269.abstract: Unemployment rates differ widely across local labor markets. I offer new empirical evidence that high local unemployment emerges because of elevated local job losing rates. Local employers, rather than local workers or location-specific factors, account for most of spatial gaps in job stability. I then propose a theory in which spatial differences in job loss emerge in equilibrium because of systematic differences between employers across local labor markets.
